title: Compose editor: JS-side YAML lint via the `yaml` package

in: Add yaml package as apps/web dep

verification.playwright: 5 baseline pass; 3 docker-gated skip without env flag

knownFollowups: Live manual smoke verified 2026-05-17 (see tasks.md). Side observation: discovered-only stacks (e.g. `plane-app`) have empty `stack.path`, so opening their compose detail page tries to read `compose.yml` from the server cwd and 404s. Tracked separately in backlog-compose-discovered-stack-readonly.
